mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM medications WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, name, is_active AS isActive, dosage, expected_doses_per_day AS expectedDosesPerDay, created_at AS createdAt FROM medications WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medications (user_id, name, is_active, dosage, expected_doses_per_day, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{isActive}, #{dosage}, #{expectedDosesPerDay}, NOW())
mapper.select:
select m.id as medication_id, m.name, m.dosage, m.expected_doses_per_day,
coalesce(sum(l.doses_taken),0) as taken_today
from medications m
left join medication_daily_logs l on m.id = l.medication_id and l.user_id = m.user_id and l.log_date = curdate()
where m.user_id = #{userId} and m.is_active = 1
group by m.id, m.name, m.dosage, m.expected_doses_per_day
select id, user_id, name, is_active, dosage, expected_doses_per_day, created_at from medications where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and is_active = 1 limit 1
